decisions.description: This shows the options that have been selected for the loop.

screens.description: This is used as a placeholder to avoid hitting limits as this will act as a break.

screens.description: This is used as a placeholder to avoid hitting limits as this will act as a break.
screens.name: Contract_Navigate_Screen
screens.label: Contract Navigate Screen

fields.name: Duplicate_user_selected_text
fields.fieldText:
The selected users in the FROM and TO dropdown list should not be the same.


Please ensure the same user is not selected and try again. You can go back to the previous screen by clicking on the previous button below.

screens.name: Error_Screen_when_no_records_identified
screens.label: Error Screen when no records identified.

fields.name: Error_Screen
fields.fieldText: Unfortunately an error has occurred please close this window and try again, an email has been raised for investigation. If you continue to have this issue raise a wise ticket with the date and time of the error and we will investigate.Thank you.

screens.description: This is used as a placeholder to avoid hitting limits as this will act as a break.

screens.label: New Business Leads Navigate Screen

screens.label: S-placement Navigate Screen

screens.name: Select_the_records_you_want_to_transfer_over
screens.label: Select the records you want to transfer over

fields.name: Record_Transfer_Screen
fields.fieldText: Select the records you want to transfer using the check boxes below:

screens.description: This is used as a placeholder to avoid hitting limits as this will act as a break.
screens.name: Shift_Navigate_Screen
screens.label: Shift Navigate Screen

screens.description: This is used as a placeholder to avoid hitting limits as this will act as a break.
screens.name: Site_Navigate_Screen
screens.label: Site Navigate Screen

fields.name: Transfer_Success_Text
fields.fieldText: Your request has been submitted and the selected records will be queued to be completed at the next available opportunity, please note this could take 1-2 hours to process. You can now click finish to close this screen.

screens.description: This is used as a placeholder to avoid hitting limits as this will act as a break.
screens.name: Task_Navigate_Screen
screens.label: Task Navigate Screen

fields.name: Transfer_from_text
fields.fieldText: Please select the user you want to transfer records FROM:

fields.name: Transfer_to_text
fields.fieldText: Please select the user you want to transfer records TO:
